title: Manufacturing Engineer - Honda Motorcycle India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Honda Motorcycle India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Honda Motorcycle India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!
